titleStmt.title: SII 31.63: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 63. (A.R. No. B 300 of 1936.) BUKKAPAṬNAM, JAMMALMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in survey No. 375/1 to the south of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1353, Sādhāraṇa, Māgha. śu. 5. Thursday corresponding to 1431 A.D., January 22.

It registers the gift of lands (specified) for maintaining the offerings (pātra bhōgamu) to the god Śrī Vīrabhadra situated at Bukkapaṭṇa and also for the merit of the king Dēvarāya mahārāya, Sāḷuva Tipparāju and Nalagaṁpa rāju, by Kumāra Timmaya, the chālumūla samasta-pekkamḍru and the devotees. It also records the exemption of taxes namely avanāya which includes aṁnnu (aṁmu-pannu ? tax on sales), paṁnu (general tax) paṇgam (one-forth share) on the gifts. It also refers to the exemption of marriage tax collected at the rate of 80 (percent) and probably a tax on woman who collects the waste material in the village market of Penukuduru.
It further refers to the specified remunerations to the temple servants like Pāṭukāmḍu (dancers), Kāḷekāmdu (horn below persons), Vise kāmḍu (flutists) Mōgate (woman maid for rangoli).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śa
kha(ka)varuṣaṁbulu . 1353 Agu
nēṭī sādhāraṇa saṁvatsara
māgha su 5 gu . bukkapaṭṇaṁ śrī
vīrabhadradēvuniki dēvarāya
mahārāyalukuṁnu sā
ḷuva tiparājuṁgārikiṁni
nalagaṁparājukuṁnu dha
rmaṁgānu Ā kumāra tiṁ
mayaṁgāru bukapaṭnaṁ
cālumūla mukhyamaI (mukhyamaina)
na samastapekkaṁḍrunu Aśaṁkhyā (Asaṁkhyā)
dibhaktuluṁnnu vīrabhadradēvara
ku pātrabhōgaṁ sāgiṁci
ri . jītānaku bukkapaṭṭaṇauna kā
ḍāraṁbhamu velicēnu kolape
kha 1 nnu maḍicēnu su
kṣētraṁgānu kutupakuṁ
ṭa polamuna malineṭi
parvvatu peṭṭina cēnu khaṁ 1

kūra tōṁṭa � . vūrisa
mastaprajaluṁma yicēdi . vīralaku
jaṭa �0 vuttamaṁ peṁḍli kaṭnaṁ
ṁ . ma maṁṭaṁ .
gānu penukuduru saṁthalō
Āḍadi pattukonēdi . Ācēlaku tōṁṭa
laku kāṁpusēsinānu bhōgālavā
sēsinānuAnnuṁnnu pannupaṁgaṁ
modalugānu yi Avanāya
luṁgonaka . Ākoluculu koṭhā
ru bhō cukoni Anubhaviṁ
pa galavāru . sanivāraṁ nāṁ
ḍu lakṣminārāyaṇadēvaraku
nu bhōgaṁsēsuvāru . yi
kramāna Acaṁdrārkka stā
yikānu Anubhaviṁci Aṁdali
pātraku pātrulukāṁḍu 2 kāḷekā
ṁḍru 2 pātralu 2 vāsekāṁḍu 1
mōgatteṁ 1 tappaka vūligaṁ sēsi
ḍuvāru . yīdhamānnaku yavvaru va
kraṁ Ayināvāru galiginānu
gaṁgakaṟata kavilala vadhiṁcina pā
pānaboduru . vāraṇāsilōnu
bāṁhmalajaṁpi na pāpāsabō
vuvāru na dharmamī kaṭukoni
vēyiṁccina dharṁma sāśanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 31.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
